title: Travel Poster
sourceTitle: Then Converted It Into Short Video Using

imagePrompts.prompt:
Create a minimalist travel-poster style line art illustration of Tokyo, Japan in a vertical poster format. Use ultra-clean architectural ink drawing lines with a monochrome sepia-black palette on a soft off-white textured paper background. Feature the iconic Tokyo Tower perfectly centered in the distance, framed by a symmetrical urban street perspective leading directly toward it.

The foreground should show a detailed Tokyo crosswalk scene with pedestrians crossing naturally, a cyclist riding through frame, compact Japanese cars, traffic lights, utility poles, subway signage, vending machines, convenience store storefronts, and authentic Japanese street details. Include realistic narrow Tokyo buildings packed with signage, small balconies, glass windows, cables, and layered architectural depth rendered in fine line detail and subtle cross-hatching shading.

Add culturally authentic Tokyo elements: Japanese kanji shop signs, metro/subway entrance signs, ramen shop banners, tiny street trees, Lawson-style convenience store details, Tokyo road markings, overhead cables, and minimal urban clutter typical of central Tokyo streets.
At the top, place the word “TOKYO” in extremely large bold modern sans-serif typography with elegant spacing inspired by Japanese editorial poster design. At the bottom, add “JAPAN” with minimalist Japanese native text “日本” and small geographic coordinate-style typography.
Keep the entire composition symmetrical, balanced, and premium like a vintage travel poster fused with contemporary Japanese graphic design and Muji-inspired minimalism.
Style keywords: ultra detailed line art, architectural sketch, urban perspective drawing, clean vector ink illustration, monochrome sepia palette, cinematic Tokyo street scene, soft beige paper texture, elegant typography, Japanese editorial design, highly detailed cityscape, premium travel poster aesthetic, minimalism, ink engraving detail, contemporary poster composition, atmospheric urban realism, hand-drawn architectural rendering.
